Question
========
What determines whether or not a respondent will give an honest answer when using Randomized Response (RRT)?

Answerlist
----------
* The surveyor decides at their own discretion.
* An honest answer will always be given when utilizing RRT.
* The result of a random binomial event.
* An honest answer is never given when utilizing RRT.

Meta-information
================
exname: Question 4
extype: schoice
exsolution: 0010
exshuffle: TRUE
